answers: Passport application: fill form, submit documents (birth certificate, ID), pay fee, give biometrics, and wait for processing.
Tips: apply well in advance (processing takes 2-6 weeks), keep passport safe, and renew before expiry for travel.
Documents needed: birth certificate, national ID, photos, and proof of citizenship. Requirements vary by country.
Passport ki: international travel er jonno government issued document. Tomar identity ar nationality prove kore.
